question: Which department has the highest total enrollments across all its courses?

results.label: Department with highest total enrollments
results.sql: SELECT departments.name, COUNT(enrollments.student_id) AS total_enrollments FROM enrollments JOIN courses ON enrollments.course_id = courses.id JOIN departments ON courses.dept_id = departments.id GROUP BY departments.id, departments.name ORDER BY total_enrollments DESC LIMIT 1;
